article_meta.title: Democracy Dies in DarknessBusinessFuture of WorkEconomyEconomic PolicyMediaPersonal FinanceTechnologyBusiness of Climate

reasoning: The summary maintains neutral, attributed language and avoids adopting any loaded framing from the source. It balances perspectives (prosecutors, Trump/allies, friends/family, Robinson’s messages) and uses careful attribution for contested claims.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs (allege, describe) and avoids charged phrasing.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All contested points (motive, radicalization) are attributed to prosecutors, Trump, or friends.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Evaluative statements are framed as others’ views, not the model’s.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Calm, clinical tone with no dramatic language.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks; descriptors are factual and sourced.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about internal motives without attribution.
custom_reasoning.slant: Perspectives are presented proportionally: prosecutors/law enforcement, Trump/allies, friends/family, Robinson’s own messages.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Includes all major perspectives mentioned in the article.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Avoids subjective qualifiers; descriptors like 'right-wing activist' are factual.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Politically neutral terms with clear attribution where needed.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Does not overemphasize negative elements beyond article’s balance.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No preferential weighting toward elites or grassroots; sources treated evenly.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than any potentially loaded elements in the source; careful attribution throughout.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Captures prosecutors, Trump/allies, friends/family, and Robinson’s messages; proportional to article content.
